## Problem

Describe the specific problem this change solves.

## Solution and scope

Summarize the implementation, affected packages, deliberate exclusions, and public API or migration impact.

## Verification

- [ ] Relevant unit and DOM tests pass.
- [ ] `npm test` passes.
- [ ] `npm run build` passes.
- [ ] `npm audit --audit-level=high` reports no unresolved high-severity issue.
- [ ] Browser, visual, accessibility, responsive, reduced-motion, and package checks were run where relevant.
- [ ] Cleanup and independent Formation/Kinetic operation remain intact.

List exact commands and results:

## Visual evidence

Add screenshots or recordings for visible interaction changes, including reduced motion when applicable.

## Agent assistance

State whether an LLM agent or another generation tool materially assisted the change, identify the assisted areas, and confirm that the complete diff and all claims were independently reviewed.

## Risks and follow-up

List known limitations, risks, or deliberately deferred work. Write `None` when there are none.
